structural_claim: Multi-scale phenomena require systematic methods to connect microscopic and macroscopic descriptions, with effective theories emerging from integrating out fast/small-scale degrees of freedom

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Physical theories flow under changes of energy scale, with low-energy physics systematically related to high-energy structure
Low-energy physics emerges from integrating out high-energy degrees of freedom in a systematic expansion
Macroscopic plasma behavior emerges from the microscopic phase space distribution function
Fast gyro-motion can be systematically averaged while retaining finite Larmor radius effects
Collective macroscopic phenomena emerge from the microscopic velocity distribution structure
